decisions.rationale: IR re-read confirms bTIpm uses style_ref Group_card_ (styles.json bgcolor var(--color_surface_default)); drsam-99657.bubble bTIpm has no explicit bgcolor or primary tint override. ContinueOnboardingBanner.tsx applies supplemental border-primary/30 bg-primary/5 atop bubbleStyle(Group_card_) — same supplemental-Tailwind pattern deferred at DASH-05 C-2. criteria_audit AC-2 and ui_evidence for bTIpm and style_ref:bTIpm both pass; named ui_ref structure, copy, and CTA routing are correct. Removing primary tint is low-priority DS polish; no downstream depends_on requires exact Group_card_ surface before advance.

Bubble bTJEO FG has no responsive hide rule and is 320px at page root; ServicesFloatingPanel.tsx uses hidden md:block. Valid ui-fidelity gap, but bTJEO and bTJEQ named ui_refs pass ui_evidence and AC-3 passes (fixed bottom-right panel outside dashboard-main). Matches SHELL-03 C-2 precedent: intentional responsive SPA deviation when mobile navigation/alternate access exists elsewhere. No MOD-DRSAM-DASHBOARD downstream item requires mobile services-panel reachability before advance; compact FAB variant is polish backlog.

Finding confirmed: prototype lacks pathenrollment1 migration; pathEnrollmentApi.ts table-then-onboarding_data fallback limits bTJEQ to at most one synthetic row. criteria_audit AC-3 passes with documented gap; FV-3 passes via fetchPathEnrollments + deriveListFromOnboardingData. Matches DASH-05 C-3 and DASH-06 C-2 schema-defer precedent — implementation-policy forbids project/ schema edits; PATHS-03 AC-3 owns pathenrollment1 create/update and PATHS-06 owns enrollment floating bar data wiring. High priority is data-layer readiness, not a DASH-07 rewrite blocker; panel code path is correct and will list full history when table exists.

Bubble FG child-tree re-read confirms bTJEO contains only bTJEQ RepeatingGroup — no Your paths header or Browse coaching paths empty-state CTA entities in IR or decompose ui_refs. ServicesFloatingPanel additions are pragmatic greenfield empty-state UX (navigate /paths per FV-4) that do not contradict passing ui_evidence for bTJEO/bTJEQ. Critique alternative says add bubble ids if IR entities are found; none exist. Low-priority workflow-parity note is satisfied by accepting intentional SPA enhancement over strict Bubble empty-RG silence.

summary: 0 fix_now, 3 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, 0 blockers, all ACs and functional checks pass. Deferred: C-1 Group_card_ primary tint as DS polish; C-2 mobile services-panel visibility as responsive SPA polish; C-3 pathenrollment1 full enrollment history to PATHS-03/PATHS-06 schema wave. Accepted: C-4 extra Your paths header and empty-state CTA as greenfield UX with no IR entities to mirror.
